description: Frankenstein citations featured in the Nature article (April 2026). These are confirmed AI-fabricated citations from the Linardon et al. (2025) study where GPT-4o generated literature reviews on mental health disorders.
source: Nature Vol 652, 2 April 2026 - 'The growing problem of hallucinated citations'
source_study: Linardon, J. et al. JMIR Ment. Health 12, e80371 (2025)

schleider2022single.notes: Real author (Schleider publishes on single-session interventions), real co-authors (Abel & Weisz), real journal (Annual Review of Clinical Psychology), plausible volume/year/pages, DOI starts correctly for journal but points to nothing. Every component is real; the combination is fake.
why_convincing: Schleider has 77+ cited papers on single-session interventions
Abel and Weisz are real collaborators of Schleider
Annual Review of Clinical Psychology Vol 18 exists (2022)
Pages 351-378 are plausible for that volume
DOI prefix 10.1146/annurev-clinpsy matches real journal DOIs
